params.name: Benedictus Safe Glass
params.description:
On Jun 12, 1910 AD, Benedictus applied for a patent for safety glass.
The inspiration for this invention came from Benedictus's experience cleaning a laboratory. He accidentally knocked over a boiling flask but found that it remained intact despite being covered in cracks. After studying it, he discovered that the flask had once contained nitrocellulose, leaving behind a thin film on the wall. Based on this amazing discovery, he created the world's first laminated glass, greatly improving the …
